{{Quote|I'm Czerka employee, Citadel Station branch, number 85. Finally worked my way out of the trenches into a promotion. Then Czerka transferred me here to the Outer Rim to manage the military reclamation effort. That wasn't the worst of it, either. Now I've got Lorso as my new superior, and a career that's going nowhere.|Corrun Falt to Meetra Surik|<ref name="KOTOR II" />}}
'''Corrun Falt''' was a male [[Human/Legends|Human]] employee of [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]] on [[Citadel Station]] who greatly disliked [[Jana Lorso]], his superior.

==Biography==
{{Quote|You didn't claw your way through the mass of faceless Czerka employees - to finally be rewarded with a meaningful posting, only to have it taken away by some woman who'd stoop to anything to get ahead.|Corrun Falt to Meetra Surik|<ref name="KOTOR II" />}}
The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]]<ref name="KOTOR II" /> Corrun Falt became an employee for [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]] following the [[Battle of Rakata Prime|end]] of the [[Jedi Civil War]]<ref name="CSWE" /> in [[3956 BBY]].<ref name="RakataDate">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' dates the [[Battle of Rakata Prime]] to [[3956 BBY]].</ref> After working against many other employees to get a promotion to a meaningful position, the corporation sent him to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] to manage a military reclamation effort.<ref name="KOTOR II" /> Falt ended up working under Czerka executive [[Jana Lorso]]<ref name="CSWE" /> on [[Citadel Station]] on the devastated [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Telos IV]]. There, he lived in apartment A3 in [[Residential Module 082]], spent his [[Time/Legends|time]] in the [[Entertainment Module 081 Cantina|cantina]] in [[Entertainment Module 081]], and had a stagnant career. Falt disliked having Lorso as his superior, as she was the one who took away his position.<ref name="KOTOR II" />

[[Meetra Surik]] convinced Falt to grant her access to the Czerka mainframe, exposing Lorso's illegal dealings and allowing her to thwart Czerka and ensure success for the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorians]]' restoration efforts on Telos. Falt would later order Czerka's mercenaries to [[Skirmish on Telos|keep Surik out]] of Czerka controlled restoration zones on Telos's surface.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Though Falt only has a significant role if Surik sides with the Ithorians, he was also supposed to figure into the Czerka storyline if Surik sides with Lorso. In this version, Falt is also plotting against Lorso. Surik could either help Falt, or report his treachery to Lorso. If the latter choice was made, then Falt would be executed by Lorso's guards.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
